description_long: This is a pair of modern, rectangular sunglasses with a bold, geometric frame. The frame features a full-rim design with a slightly thick profile and angular corners, giving it a contemporary and stylish appearance. The lenses are dark-tinted, providing substantial coverage and a sleek, uniform look. The temples are straight and slender, with a subtle metallic accent near the hinges that adds a touch of sophistication. The bridge is a solid, straight piece that connects the two lenses seamlessly, contributing to the overall sturdy structure. No visible brand logo or decorative engravings are present, emphasizing a minimalist yet fashionable urban aesthetic.
description: Rectangular, full-rim sunglasses with dark lenses and a bold, modern frame. The temples are straight and feature subtle metallic accents near the hinges.
description_view_0: Front view showing the rectangular shape, full-rim frame, and dark-tinted lenses.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the straight, slender temple and metallic hinge accent.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the inner frame structure and the alignment of the temples.
description_view_3: Right side view mirroring the left, with a clear view of the temple and hinge detail.
attribute_frame_design: Rectangular, full-rim frame with a bold, angular geometry and slightly thick profile. The frame features straight temples and a solid, straight bridge, with metallic accents at the hinges.
attribute_lens_tint: Dark gray tint with uniform coverage, providing a sleek and opaque appearance. The lenses are not mirrored or gradient.
attribute_bridge_style: Solid, straight bridge connecting the two lenses seamlessly, with no visible nose pads or additional features.
attribute_temple_detailing: Straight, slender temples with a subtle metallic accent near the hinges. No engravings or decorative patterns are visible.
